2603.22966.title: Set-Valued Prediction for Large Language Models with Feasibility-Aware Coverage Guarantees
2603.22966.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) inherently operate over a large generation space, yet conventional usage typically reports the most likely generation (MLG) as a point prediction, which underestimates the model's capability: although the top-ranked response can be incorrect, valid answers may still exist within the broader output space and can potentially be discovered through repeated sampling. This observation motivates moving from point prediction to set-valued prediction, where the model produces a set of candidate responses rather than a single MLG. In this paper, we propose a principled framework for set-valued prediction, which provides feasibility-aware coverage guarantees. We show that, given the finite-sampling nature of LLM generation, coverage is not always achievable: even with multiple samplings, LLMs may fail to yield an acceptable response for certain questions within the sampled candidate set. To address this, we establish a minimum achievable risk level (MRL), below which statistical coverage guarantees cannot be satisfied. Building on this insight, we then develop a data-driven calibration procedure that constructs prediction sets from sampled responses by estimating a rigorous threshold, ensuring that the resulting set contains a correct answer with a desired probability whenever the target risk level is feasible. Extensive experiments on six language generation tasks with five LLMs demonstrate both the statistical validity and the predictive efficiency of our framework.
2603.22966.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）本質上在一個廣泛的生成空間中運作，但傳統用法通常將最可能的生成（MLG）報告為一個點預測，這低估了模型的能力：儘管排名最高的回應可能是錯誤的，但在更廣泛的輸出空間中仍可能存在有效答案，並且可以通過重複抽樣潛在地發現這些答案。這一觀察促使我們從點預測轉向集合值預測，模型生成一組候選回應，而不是單一的MLG。在本文中，我們提出了一個原則性框架來進行集合值預測，該框架提供了考慮可行性的覆蓋保證。我們顯示，考慮到LLM生成的有限抽樣特性，覆蓋並不總是可實現的：即使進行多次抽樣，LLMs也可能無法對某些問題在抽樣的候選集中產生可接受的回應。為了解決這個問題，我們建立了一個最低可達風險水平（MRL），在此之下無法滿足統計覆蓋保證。在此基礎上，我們開發了一個數據驅動的校準程序，通過估計嚴格的閾值來從抽樣回應中構建預測集，確保在目標風險水平可行時，生成的集合以所需的概率包含正確答案。對五個LLM進行的六個語言生成任務的廣泛實驗展示了我們框架的統計有效性和預測效率。
2603.22966.author: Ye Li et.al.
2603.22966.authors: Ye Li, Anqi Hu, Yuanchang Ye, Shiyan Tong, Zhiyuan Wang, Bo Fu
